svg.title: Phase 4 upgrade roadmap for multi-agent research system
svg.desc: Six pillars of improvement organized from foundational to advanced: context management, memory, LangGraph checkpointing, model optimization, observability, and API/streaming.
svg.text: Six pillars · from foundational to advanced

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I implement token counting and context trimming in LangChain with Ollama?')
g.text: count tokens per node, warn at 80%

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me how to implement sliding window context compression for a LangGraph researcher agent')
sendPrompt('How do I implement finding summarization to compress context in a multi-agent system?')
sendPrompt('How do I implement a semantic memory store using ChromaDB for a LangGraph agent?')
sendPrompt('Show me a 3-tier memory design: working, episodic, and semantic for a research agent')
sendPrompt('How do I implement memory retrieval with MMR (maximal marginal relevance) to avoid redundant findings?')
sendPrompt('Show me how to add SqliteSaver checkpointer to a LangGraph StateGraph with thread_id config')
sendPrompt('How do I use thread_id and configurable in LangGraph to resume a paused run?')
sendPrompt('How do I expose human-in-the-loop interrupts in LangGraph so the critic can ask for approval?')
sendPrompt('Show me how to implement prompt caching for repeated system prompts in an Ollama-based agent')
sendPrompt('How do I implement dynamic temperature and num_predict tuning per agent role in Ollama?')
sendPrompt('How do I implement structured output parsing with retry logic and Pydantic validation for Ollama agents?')
sendPrompt('How do I add LangSmith tracing to a LangGraph multi-agent system for latency and token tracking?')
sendPrompt('Show me how to build a rubric-based eval scorer for research reports: coverage, citations, coherence')
sendPrompt('How do I implement a confidence calibration system where the critic self-scores its certainty?')
g.text: route on score not just APPROVED

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me a FastAPI SSE endpoint that streams LangGraph node transitions as server-sent events')
sendPrompt('How do I add a /runs endpoint to FastAPI that lists and retrieves persisted research runs?')
sendPrompt('Build me a minimal React or HTML frontend that calls the SSE research endpoint and renders progress live')
g.text: show agent steps in real time

svg.text: What you already have (keep and build on)
What each pillar signals to an interviewer

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What questions do AI engineers get asked about context window management in interviews?')
sendPrompt('What should I know about memory types in AI agents for a junior AI engineer interview?')
sendPrompt('Why does checkpointing matter in multi-agent LLM systems? What does it unlock?')
sendPrompt('What model optimization concepts should a junior AI engineer know?')

svg.text: click any card to get implementation help ↗
